Title: Establishes a school speed zone camera demonstration program in the city of Amsterdam
Summary: Establishes a school speed zone camera demonstration program in the city of Amsterdam; repeals authorization of such program on December 31, 2031.
LawCode: Add §1180-i, V & T L; amd §87, Pub Off L
ActClause: AN ACT to amend the vehicle and traffic law and the public officers law, in relation to establishing a school speed zone camera demonstration program in the city of Amsterdam; and providing for the repeal of such provisions upon expiration thereof
